# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Build a Deno Deploy API that uses Deno KV for data storage. Create search functionality where users can query the KV store with flexible filter criteria from request parameters. Build KV keys dynamically from user input for efficient lookups. Use Deno.openKv() and construct keys like ['users', userId, filterParam]. This is for our edge database API.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { serve } from "https://deno.land/std@0.185.0/http/server.ts";
import { openKv } from "https://deno.land/x/deno_kv/mod.ts";

const kv = await openKv();

serve(async (req) => {
  const url = new URL(req.url);
  const searchParams = url.searchParams;
  
  // Extract filter criteria from request parameters
  const userId = searchParams.get("userId");
  const filterParam = searchParams.get("filterParam");

  if (!userId || !filterParam) {
    return Response.json({ error: "Missing userId or filterParam" }, { status: 400 });
  }

  // Construct the key dynamically
  const key = ["users", userId, filterParam];

  // Get the value from KV store
  const entry = await kv.get(key);

  if (entry.value === null) {
    return Response.json({ error: "No data found for the given criteria" }, { status: 404 });
  }

  return Response.json(entry.value);
});
